name: io.github.sharpninja/mcpserver-cline-plugin
description: MCP server for Cline (VSCode) providing TODO management, session logging, requirements tracking, GraphRAG knowledge graph, and per-turn + build-verification enforcement scripts via McpServer
author: Payton Byrd (The Sharp Ninja)

MCP_WORKSPACE_PATH.description: Absolute path to the workspace root containing AGENTS-README-FIRST.yaml

MCPSERVER_CACHE_DIR.description: Override the offline cache directory path
